text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: MMLEADS │ August 2021 │ V 1.0 94 

MDCR_MS_CD 

LABEL: Medicare Status Code — Latest in Year 

DESCRIPTION: This Medicare status code variable indicates how a beneficiary currently qualifies for Medicare. 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: MBSF (derived) 

VALUES: 10 = Aged without end-stage renal disease (ESRD) 
11 = Aged with ESRD 
20 = Disabled without ESRD 
21 = Disabled with ESRD 
31 = ESRD only 
Null/missing = not Medicare enrolled 

COMMENT: CCW
